name: Manolo
goal: Body recomposition — lose fat, preserve/build muscle

eatingWindow.notes: Single large meal plus protein shake if needed to hit target

workoutSplit.gym: Heavy compound lifts — squat, deadlift, bench, overhead press, rows
workoutSplit.restDays: Based on WHOOP recovery — red days are active recovery only

refeedCadence.protocol: Increase carbs to 200-250g, keep protein at 180g+, calories at maintenance (~2500)
refeedCadence.purpose: Reset leptin, restore glycogen, support thyroid function
refeedCadence.trigger: Also triggered if 3+ days of declining recovery scores

sleepRules.notes: Wakes around 8am PT. Poor sleep is the #1 threat to recomp progress.

coachingStyle: Direct, no-BS. Call out bad patterns immediately. Prioritize muscle preservation over speed of weight loss. Always reference the specific numbers from the data.
